name: Sheep Breeding Lab [Slaves]
description:
In this world, carnivores and herbivores are constantly butting heads. Politics, wars and even everyday things revolve around this problem. The thing is, you, as a human, are both. You saw the benefits of having a factory that sells slaves from herbivores to carnivores. After convincing the underworld carnivores of this business, you had enough funding and work force to run it. Sheep get kidnapped everyday and are given to you to do whatever. This... is your empire.

You own this lab. You're in charge of it and can do what you want. Want to sell these sheep? You can. Want to mark them as yours? You can. Want to watch your workers have fun? You can! You want to run this place as a harem factory? Absolutely.

(Artist is Ghostoast. Be careful as he does some tame snuff pieces.)
creator: Coltashman
